executor live (newest output 2026-07-11) |  ### Issues Found  **[RES] Product-repo residue (Section 13) — top actionable** - `/Users/brien/Workspaces/Core/products/cast`: **337 dirty, 332 aged >24h (oldest 90h), 328x farm/corpus/**. This is the exact recompute-without-commit pattern from SIG-RESIDUE-DISPOSITION-2026-07-01. Disposition needed: characterize (idempotency dry-run to confirm byte-identical to current compute) then commit-or-discard as one act. Recurrence across sweeps = signal to install producer-side write-through. - `cortege` (2 dirty, dashboard.html), `library-index` (5, chain_audit portfolio json), `intent` (7, 2 aged signals 229h) — smaller, same disposition protocol.  **[DEC] Pending Brien-gated decisions (Section 14) — delivery escalation** Top 3 by age, all L2: 1. **33d** — Parallax three-axis open refinements incl. 2 Wardley dissents with no user anchor. `/Users/brien/Workspaces/Core/products/parallax/.intent/signals/SIG-2026-05-31-three-axis-open-refinements-notice.md` 2. **33d** — Ratify/reject 3 intent positioning DDRs (orchestration-spine, memory-altitude, verbatim-passthrough). `/Users/brien/Workspaces/Core/frameworks/intent/.intent/signals/SIG-2026-05-31-*.md` 3. **28d** — Pulse consumption gate, 2 weeks overdue, zero consumption entries. `/Users/brien/Workspaces/Core/products/pulse/.intent/signals/SIG-2026-06-10-pulse-consumption-gate.md` - ❌ **Escalated:** Layer 4.2 promote/retire (surfaced 06-12, 06-28, 07-03 x2, 07-08 = 5 times, answered 0). Now legitimately blocked on the fresh warn-only calibration window (opened 07-08, closes 07-18) so it correctly cannot return until then. No action until the window closes. - Register drift: header says "6 items" but lists 7 rows — one-line fix to the register.  **[TCC] Toolchain currency (Section 15) — informational, no action required** - brew (7): c-ares, fontconfig, libffi, mlx, mlx-c, node, p11-kit · npm -g (4): netlify-cli, npm, typescript, vercel · pip (1): pip. Holding a node major bump is a valid call; nothing here is a governance failure.  **Governance audit FAILs worth noting (from today's 8):** - Check 18.5: RULES.md content_hash drift (undeclared edit, SIG-RULES-DRIFT) - Check 20: 7 live skills-engine retired-term references in non-allowlisted files (WS-DDR-027) - Check 14: 3 filenames in Core/ match client identifiers — needs review - Check 15: 2 canonical artifacts stale beyond freshness window - Check 25: 1 duplicate WS-DDR header collision in DECISIONS.md - Check 18/18.6: library-index daily-health summary absent today (producer pipeline not emitting)  These are catch-net surfaces (not write-through), so per protocol I'm reporting, not auto-fixing. The `cast` residue and the DDR header collision are the two I'd action first if you want to burn down debt this session.  ### Active Engagement Zones (modified <24h) None.
